ddls:
CREATE TABLE "navigation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigation parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the navigation parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the navigation parameter (e.g., String, Number, Object) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the parameter is required or not */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "platform_specific" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is platform-specific */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parameter is deprecated */,
  "example_value" TEXT /* Provides an example value for the parameter */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "window_animations" (
  "anim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each window animation */,
  "anim_name" TEXT /* Name of the window animation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the window animation */,
  "platform_support" TEXT /* Lists platforms that support the animation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the animation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animation_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animation duration */,
  "duration_value" REAL /* Value of the animation duration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the animation duration (e.g., ms) */,
  "platform_support" TEXT /* Lists platforms that support the duration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "platform_support" TEXT /* Lists platforms that support the event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "callback_functions" (
  "func_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each callback function */,
  "func_name" TEXT /* Name of the callback function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the callback function */,
  "platform_support" TEXT /* Lists platforms that support the callback function */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the callback function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("func_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_differences" (
  "diff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform difference */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation parameter */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the difference occurs (e.g., App, Web) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform difference */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the platform difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_differences_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES navigation_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_differences_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES navigation_platforms ("platform_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigation_parameters_platforms" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation parameter */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the relationship */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the relationship is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "param_animation" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the navigation parameter */,
  "anim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the window animation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Tracks the last update time of the relationship */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the relationship is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id", "anim_id")
)
